ExchangeRate.title: ExchangeRate
ExchangeRate.description: Represents the exchange rate between TWD and VND for a specific user.

rate.description: The exchange rate of TWD to VND (e.g., 1 TWD = 780 VND).

updatedAt.description: The last time the rate was updated.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Transaction entity.

senderName.description: The name of the sender in the transaction.

twdAmount.description: The amount of TWD sent in the transaction.

feeTwd.description: The fee charged for the transaction, in TWD.

vndAmount.description: The calculated VND amount received after deducting fees.

timestamp.description: The date and time when the transaction occurred.

exchangeRate.description: The exchange rate at the time of transaction.

User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the application.

uid.description: Unique identifier for the User entity, same as Firebase Auth UID.

email.description: The email address of the user.

displayName.description: The display name of the user.

photoURL.description: The URL of the user's profile picture.

lastLogin.description: The last time the user logged in.

definition.description: Stores user profile information. The document ID is the Firebase Auth UID.
Stores transaction data for a specific user.
